'''vahuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoboehmite|pseudoboehmite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoboehmite|pseudoboehmite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vahuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væhihith|væhihith]] || [[word:væhihij|væhihij]] || [[word:væhihish|væhihish]] || [[word:væhihi|væhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vahuhuhuth|vahuhuhuth]] || [[word:vahuhuhuj|vahuhuhuj]] || [[word:vahuhuhush|vahuhuhush]] || [[word:vahuhuhu|vahuhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vahuhuth|vahuhuth]] || [[word:vahuhuj|vahuhuj]] || [[word:vahuhush|vahuhush]] || [[word:vahuhu|vahuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vahufhuth|vahufhuth]] || [[word:vahufhuj|vahufhuj]] || [[word:vahufhush|vahufhush]] || [[word:vahufhuf|vahufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vahuhuthu|vahuhuthu]] || [[word:vahuhuju|vahuhuju]] || [[word:vahuhushu|vahuhushu]] || [[word:vahuhuku|vahuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vahuhuth|vahuhuth]] || [[word:vahuhuj|vahuhuj]] || [[word:vahuhush|vahuhush]] || [[word:vahuhu|vahuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vahuhuthul|vahuhuthul]] || [[word:vahuhujul|vahuhujul]] || [[word:vahuhushul|vahuhushul]] || [[word:vahuhukul|vahuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vahuhuthuthu|vahuhuthuthu]] || [[word:vahuhujuju|vahuhujuju]] || [[word:vahuhushushu|vahuhushushu]] || [[word:vahuhuku|vahuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vahuhuthun|vahuhuthun]] || [[word:vahuhujun|vahuhujun]] || [[word:vahuhushun|vahuhushun]] || [[word:vahuhukun|vahuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vahuhuthuoro|vahuhuthuoro]] || [[word:vahuhujuoro|vahuhujuoro]] || [[word:vahuhushuoro|vahuhushuoro]] || [[word:vahuhukuoro|vahuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
